[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001101 4
1 1101011 5
2 1101010 4
3 1001101 4
4 1011111 6
5 1111100 5
6 0000000 a
7 0010110 3

01 10 0111010 4
12 21 1111111 a
23 32 1001101 4 match 0 3
34 43 1011001 4
45 54 1010000 2
56 65 0010110 3 match 7
67 76 0111110 5
70 07 0101110 4

35 53 1001001 3

71 17 0111110 5

36 63 1011111 6 match 4
47 74 1111100 5 match 5
50 05 0100010 2
61 16 0111110 5
72 27 1101101 5

37 73 1101101 5
